name: Fresh Fruit Pizza Cookie
recipeIngredient: 20 oz refrigerated chocolate chip cookie dough
1/2 fresh pineapple, cut into thin wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Press small pieces of cookie dough into a 14-inch pizza pan.
2. Bake in a 350°F oven for 12 to 15 minutes or until browned and puffed. Cool completely on a wire rack.
3. Beat cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla in a medium bowl until blended.
4. Spread the mixture over the cooled cookie.
5. Arrange pineapple around the outer edge of the cream cheese.
6. Arrange kiwifruit, bananas, and raspberries in a flower pattern over the pineapple.
7. Brush with melted jam.
